prompt: Create a cinematic dark-fantasy royal triumphal procession titled Triumphal Return. A full-body frontal view of two regal riders advancing slowly down a wet cobblestone avenue through a medieval capital city. The left rider is a noble queen or female knight on a white horse, wearing polished silver plate armor, an ornate white cloak, gold filigree details, and braided blonde hair; her face is deliberately smooth and featureless with a soft skin-toned blur. The right rider is a king or prince on a black horse, wearing an immaculate white ceremonial military coat with gold embroidery, medals, braided cords, high collar, white cape, dark curly shoulder-length hair, and a similarly featureless blurred face. The two horses are large and realistic, walking side by side, with elaborate dark leather tack, gold medallions, decorative breastplates, reins, and royal harness ornaments. On both sides of the street, show exactly six prominent armored guards visible in the foreground and midground, three on the left and three on the right, wearing dark steel armor and helmets, some holding spears or standards; their faces are also blurred or obscured. Behind them, dense cheering crowds raise arms and banners. Tall black-and-gold heraldic banners hang from stone buildings on both sides. In the far background, an enormous Gothic palace or cathedral complex rises with many towers, spires, arched windows, buttresses, and ornate stonework. Confetti and flower petals fill the air and scatter across the wet reflective street. Lighting is dramatic late-afternoon sunlight breaking through clouds, with backlit particles, warm highlights on armor, deep shadows, volumetric haze, and a grand epic atmosphere. Use ultra-realistic detail, cinematic composition, symmetrical central framing, low eye-level perspective, 4:5 vertical aspect ratio, shallow depth of field with the riders sharp and palace slightly softened. Color palette: ivory white, black, antique gold, dark stone gray, muted rose petals, and warm sunlight. Avoid modern objects, readable text, logos, or extra main riders. The mood should feel like a victorious royal homecoming after war, majestic and solemn.
